scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shell,chat,editor,viz -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --prefix packages/shell" "npm run dev --prefix packages/chat-vue2" "npm run dev --prefix packages/editor-vue3" "npm run dev --prefix packages/viz-react"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix packages/shell && npm install --prefix packages/chat-vue2 && npm install --prefix packages/editor-vue3 && npm install --prefix packages/viz-react
